reviews.name: 홍밥풀
reviews.content:
집 뒤에 산이 있어서 밥풀이는 항상 산으로 산책을 가는데 벌레가 너무 많아서 털 이곳저곳에 벌레를 꽤 많이 달고 다니더라고요..
어쩔 때는 이상한 애벌레 같은 것도 머리에 대롱대롱 달고 있어서 진짜 싫었는데ㅠㅠ
해충 방지되는 안티버그 에어리 올인원 입히고 벌레 걱정 없이 풀숲에 마음껏 들어가게 내버려뒀어요!!

이번에 메쉬 올인원 신상이 출시되어서 밥풀이는 귀여운 갈매기 그림이 있는 옐로 색상을 입어봤어요!
머리털이 풍성해도 다 감싸줄 수 있는 모자도 있어서 너무 귀여워요!!
체형에 따라 등길이 조절도 가능하고, 옷에 있는 밴딩이 부드러워서 올인원이어도 움직이기에 불편함이 전혀 없어보였어요!
밥풀이도 이거 입고 잘 뛰어다니더라고요 ㅎㅎ

그리고 무엇보다 이거 입으니 밥풀 몸에 벌레가 안 붙어서 가장 좋았어요!
헤잇미 시리즈 따로 구매해서 올인원이랑 같이 사용하고 입혀야겠어영 ㅎㅎ

그리고 이거 입으면 쫄병스낵 같아진다는 점~~ 왕 귀여워요~~
reviews.content_en:
Since there's a mountain behind our house, Bapbuli always goes for walks there, and there are so many bugs that her fur picks up quite a lot of them... 😭 Sometimes she'd even have weird caterpillar-like things dangling from her head, which was really gross 😭

After applying the anti-bug ANTI BUG airy all-in-one, I could let her play freely in the grass without worrying about bugs!!

The new mesh all-in-one came out, and Bapbuli tried on the cute yellow color with a seagull design! 🐾 There's even a hat that can cover her fluffy head completely, and it's so adorable!! The back length is adjustable depending on body shape, and the elastic bands on the outfit are so soft that it doesn't seem uncomfortable to move around in even as an all-in-one! Bapbuli runs around just fine in it hehe

But best of all, bugs don't stick to Bapbuli's body when she's wearing this! I should get the BITE ME series separately and use it together with the all-in-one hehe

And one more thing - when she wears this, she looks like a little soldier snack~~ So cute~~

reviews.name: 리치
reviews.content:
등길이 37cm 몸무게 7.2kg → 2XL 착용했습니다 !
안티버그 올인원이 더 귀여운 디자인과 여름에 잘 어울리는 색감으로 돌아왔어요💛 통풍이 잘 되어서 더위를 많이 타는 강아지임에도 딱히 더워하는 느낌은 없더라구요 !! 구멍이 촘촘해서 벌레들이 털에 달라붙지 않아서 너무 만족했어요 ㅠㅠ 털빵빵 견주님들은 공감하시겠지만,, 진드기뿐만 아니라 날파리들도 털에 박히는거 아시죠,,👀고무줄도 신축성이 좋아서 불편함 없이 즐겁게 산책 완료했답니당 🍀
reviews.content_en: Back length 37cm, weight 7.2kg → wearing 2XL! 💛 The anti-bug all-in-one is back with an even cuter design and summer-appropriate colors! It breathes really well, so even though my pup gets hot easily, she doesn't seem bothered at all!! The mesh is tight enough that bugs don't stick to her fur, and I'm so satisfied 😭 I'm sure other fluffy-haired dog parents can relate, but you know how not just ticks but also gnats get stuck in the fur, right?? 👀 The elastic is stretchy too, so our walks were comfortable and fun 🍀

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
2.36 키로 / 말티푸 
🍒 목길이 25cm / 가슴둘레 34.5 / 등길이 33cm

덩치에 비해 등길이가 쪼금 긴편인 저희집 가나디한테는 너무 잘 맞았어요 !! 다리가 조금 남긴하지만 신체구조상 ..ㅋㅋ 어떤옷이든 다리는 살짝 남더라구요 일단 패턴이 너무 귀여워서 다른집 안티버그 옷보다 만족스러워서 요즘 산책시 최애옷이랍니다 ♥
잘 늘어나서 머리 넣고 앞다리 넣은담에 잡아서 뒷다리넣으면 잘 입힐 수 있습니다. 조금 더 편하고 널널하게 입힌다면 다음 사이즈도 괜찮을거같네요!! 저희집 가나디는 혹시나 틈생기면 그 속으로 들어갈까 딱 맞춰입혔어용

여태까지 잔디밭 , 야간 산책까지하면서 아직까지 진드기 한번도 안물린 템이지 않나 생각합니다 ㅎㅎ 불안해서 이거없으면 산책 못가요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en:
2.36kg / Maltipoo
🍒 Neck length 25cm / Chest circumference 34.5cm / Back length 33cm

For our Canadi who has a slightly longer back length for her size, it fits perfectly!! 😆 The legs are a bit long, but that's just her body structure... ㅋㅋ Any outfit leaves the legs a bit exposed anyway. The pattern is so cute that I'm more satisfied with it than other anti-bug clothes, and it's my favorite outfit for walks these days ♥ It stretches well, so you can put the head in, then the front legs, pull it, and then slide in the back legs - it goes on easily. If you want an even easier, roomier fit, the next size would probably work too!! Our Canadi wears it fitted just right so there are no gaps she could squeeze into.

We've done grass walks and night walks so far, and I don't think she's ever gotten a tick bite while wearing this piece hehe It makes me so anxious that I can't go on walks without it 😭

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이사오니 공원에서 산책할일이 많아서 구매했어요.
이틀 입고 나갔는데, 넘 맘에 들어요.
망사같은 원단일꺼라 생각해서 까끌거릴까 걱정했는데
다른 친구들 입은거 보다 부드럽고 유연하면서도 짱짱합니다.
 키큰 2.6키로 말티푸라 마른편인데
M사이즈 잘  맞고,]긴다리와 날씬한 몸이 더 돋보입니다 ㅋㅋ
너무 만족해서 베스트랑쿨썬캡세트도 라이브때  구매하려구요^^
reviews.content_en: We moved so there are lots of park walks now, and I bought this. Wore it for two outings and I'm so into it. I was worried the mesh-like fabric would be rough, but it's softer and more flexible than what other friends' dogs wear while still being sturdy. My 2.6kg Maltipoo is tall and lean, and the M size fits perfectly - her long legs and slim body look even better ㅋㅋ I'm so satisfied that I'm planning to buy the best rank cool sun cap set during the next live stream too ^^

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
풀숲에서 응가하는걸 좋아해서 안티버그 올인원은 필수에요!! 촘촘하지만 통기성 좋아보이는 메쉬 소재라 여름밤에도 걱정 없이 입힐 수 있겠어요! 이전보다 모자가 더 커져서 쏙 잘 들어가고 푸루르 털어도 잘 안벗겨져요! 귀여운 파우치도 있어 여행갈때 챙기기도 좋을 것 같아용💭
안티버그 가공까지 되어있으니 올해도 안심산책 쌉파서블 🛡️😎

4.3키로 가슴은 미디움이지만 등길이가 라지인 강지, 털찐상태에서 라지 여유잇게 잘 맞아요!
reviews.content_en:
She likes to poop in the grass, so the anti-bug all-in-one is essential!! The mesh fabric is tight but looks breathable, so I can put it on without worry even on summer nights! The hat is bigger than before so it fits perfectly and doesn't come off even when she shakes 💭 There's a cute pouch too, which will be great to bring when traveling! With anti-bug treatment already applied, safe walks this year are totally doable 🛡️😎

4.3kg with medium chest but large back length - my pup wears the large size with plenty of room even with her full fur coat!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 진드기 걱정에 처음 사보는데 퀄리티도 좋고 생각보다 작은거 같아요! 저희 강아지는 4.4키로에 등길이가 조금 긴편입니다!! 색깔은 홈페이지 사진보다 조금 어두운 편입니다 주머니가 달려있어 소지하기 편해요
reviews.content_en: I tried this for the first time because I was worried about ticks, and the quality is good and it's smaller than I thought! My pup is 4.4kg with a slightly longer back length!! The color is a bit darker than the website photos. It has a pocket which is convenient for carrying.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 바잇미 미친자는 패딩부터 올인원해충방지 , 우비까지 다 가지고 잇숨미다 .. 디자인부터 퀄리티 넘 좋구요 !! 주변 지인들 까지 따라사게 하는 미친 귀여움 감사합니댜 , 너무 기여워요 !
reviews.content_en: I have the BITE ME crazy set with padding, all-in-one pest prevention, and rain jacket... both design and quality are amazing!! Even people around me ended up buying it - the crazy cuteness is insane, thank you 😆 It's so cute!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 진짜 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋㅋ 올인원은 처음 입혀보는데 신축성이 좋아서 생각보다 입히기 편했고 화사한 색이라 더더 귀엽습니당><
reviews.content_en: It's seriously so cute ㅋㅋㅋ It's my first time putting on an all-in-one and the stretchy material made it easier to put on than expected, and the bright color makes it even cuter ><

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
실제로받으니 소재가 더 좋네요! 
비숑 특성상 털에 나뭇잎이고 벌레고 마구 붙어서 
샀는데~ 대만족이요!!!
reviews.content_en: The material is even better in person! With my Bichon's characteristics, leaves and bugs stick to her fur like crazy, but I'm SO satisfied!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
웬만한 모자는 다 벗겨지던데 잘고정되서 좋았어용 ! 
5.4kg 비숑 기준 길이 잘 맞았어요 ! 

졸귀탱탱구리
reviews.content_en:
Most hats slip off but this one stays in place - that's great! For a 5.4kg Bichon, the length fits perfectly!

So precious and fluffy ❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
귀여워요
빨리 산책 가고싶어요  ♡♡♡
평소 옷 L사이즈 입히는데 아주 딱 맞아요 
올인원 제품은 처음 입히는거라 사이즈 고민 많이했어요 ㅠ 
XL 입었으면 조금 여유 있었을거같아요 
말티푸 4.3 입니다 등길이 매우 길어요
reviews.content_en:
It's so cute! 🐕 Can't wait to take her for a walk soon ♡♡♡
She usually wears size L, and this fits perfectly.
I was really worried about sizing since this is my first all-in-one outfit for her 😭
If I had gone with XL, there would've been more room.
She's a Maltipoo weighing 4.3kg with a very long back.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
강아지도 편안해하고 저도 마음놓고 산책할수 있어서 좋았어요~ 요즘 입히기 딱좋아서 교복템으로 착용하고 있습니다 :)
저희 강아지는
다리가 길어서 팔다리부분이 좀더 긴 버전도 있으면 좋을것같아요 :)
reviews.content_en:
My dog is comfortable and I can take her on walks with peace of mind, which is great! 🐾 It's perfect for this season so I'm using it as her everyday outfit :)
My pup has long legs, so it would be nice if there was a version with longer limbs ☺️

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content:
일단 너무너무 귀엽습니다!
중현견은 모자가 쓰자마자 벗겨져요.. 목이긴건지 고무가약한건지는 모르겠지만 ㅜㅜ xl사도 똑같을지궁금해요...그래도귀여우ㅜ
reviews.content_en:
First of all, it's SO incredibly cute!
With my medium-sized dog, the hat keeps falling off right after putting it on... I'm not sure if the neck is too loose or if the elastic is weak 😅 I'm curious if the XL size would have the same issue... but it's still adorable 🥺

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미 올인원 너무 잘 입고 있어서 새로운 디자인으로 하나 더 샀어요!
산책 후 진드기 붙어 고생한 후로는 무조건 옷 입히는데 재질도 시원하고 답답하지않은 것 같아서 좋습니다:) 귀여움은 덤!!
reviews.content_en:
My pup is wearing the BITE ME all-in-one so well that I bought another one in a new design!
Ever since we had trouble with ticks after walks, I always put clothes on her. The fabric feels cool and doesn't feel stuffy, which I love :) The cuteness is just a bonus!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 몸무게 6.2키로 등길이가 긴 아이인데 사이즈 잘맞아요 작년에 나온거보다 편하게나온듯해요 올인원 싫어하는아이인데 작년꺼 한발자국도 안떼서 반품했는데 올해꺼 그나마 걷기합니다 싫어하긴해도 ㅜㅜ그래도 진드기때문에 잘 입혀볼라구요~
reviews.content_en: My dog weighs 6.2kg and has a long back, but the size fits perfectly! It seems more comfortable than the version from last year. She usually hates all-in-ones—she wouldn't even take a single step in last year's version so I returned it—but this year's version, she actually walks in it somewhat 😭 She still doesn't like it, but I'll keep putting it on her because of the tick prevention 🐾

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
요즘 진드가난리여서 입힐려고주문했습니다
색상도 너무쨍하고예쁘네요
불편한곳 없는지 산책잘다녀왔습니다^^
다른색상도 사아겠어여 이번꺼 너무좋아요
reviews.content_en:
I ordered this because there are so many ticks going around lately.
The color is so vibrant and pretty!
It seems comfortable with no issues, and we had a great walk today ^^
I'm definitely getting another color too! This one is so good!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 4키로 강아지 라지 맞네요 벌레걱정없어 좋아요 주머니가 있어서 보관이 편해요
reviews.content_en: For a 4kg dog, Large is the right size! It's great not having to worry about bugs. The pocket is convenient for storage.

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content:
산으로 늘 산책하는애기라 해충방지 옷 늘 입어서,.  
이번건 넘 가성비좋게 이쁘네요
reviews.content_en: My pup is always hiking with me, so she's always wearing bug-prevention clothes. This one has great value for money and looks so cute!

reviews.name: N****
reviews.content: 색상 너무 귀엽고 디자인도 예뻐요. 여름에 진드기 모기로 부터 절대 지키는 안티버그올인원 준비 해 두니 마음이 든든해용
reviews.content_en: The color is so adorable and the design is lovely. Having an anti-bug all-in-one outfit ready for summer protection against ticks and mosquitoes gives me such peace of mind! 🐕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
작년에민트구입하고 여유분필요해서 블루도 구입 망사가 촘촘해서 약간의 두께감은있음
신축성없어 여유있게 구매
reviews.content_en: I bought the mint color last year and needed another one, so I got the blue too. The mesh is tight so it has a bit of thickness to it. Since there's no stretch, I'd recommend sizing up for a comfortable fit.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
7k 등이긴 비숑 XL삿으면적을뻔
이옷은신축성없어 여유있게 주문했는대 
딱맞음ㅋ
메쉬치곤 촘촘하고 부드럽운재질은아님
모자가 미스네요 커서 앞을 다가림
조절하는스프링이 있었으면ㅠ
reviews.content_en: My Bichon is around 7kg and XL seemed like it would be too big, but it fits perfectly lol. The mesh is pretty dense and the material isn't that soft. The hat is a miss though—it's too big and covers the face. I wish there was an adjustable strap ㅠ

reviews.name: 선****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 여름에도 시원하겠어요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and so cute! 😄 Should be nice and cool for summer too

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 사이즈 날 맞고 이쁘네요
reviews.content_en: Perfect fit and looks pretty!

reviews.name: 허****
reviews.content:
애기가 몸길이가 길어서 올인원을 못샀는데
괜찮을것 같아서 xl를 시켰는데 길이가 짧아서
다리부분은 못넣을것 같아요.
입히기 전에 사이즈 교환 고민도 했는데 2xl는 가슴 둘레가 너무 클것 같아요
그래도 담주에 반려견 순찰대 시험보러 가야되서 
한강이라 입혀야되서 입힐거예요. 
다리끼면 이걸 나한테 왜힙혔어 누나 당장 빼죠 그러고 쳐다봐요…
reviews.content_en: My pup has a long body so I couldn't get the onesie, so I ordered XL thinking it would work, but the length is too short and the legs won't fit. I considered exchanging for a bigger size before putting it on, but 2XL seems like the chest would be way too big. But we have a pet patrol test next week by the Han River so I need to wear it anyway. When the legs pinch, she just stares at me like 'why did you put this on me, unnie? Take it off right now' 😅

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저희집 강아지 봄이 여름에 산책 시킬때 입혀보려고 구매했어요. 입혀보니 귀엽네요. M사이즈 했다가 좀 딱맞게 나온 스타일이라 L사이즈로 교환했어요.
reviews.content_en: I bought this to put on my dog Bomi for walks in the summer. It looks so cute on her! I originally got size M but it fit a bit snug, so I exchanged it for size L.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
산책갈때마다 패치랑 스프레이로 무장하고 다녓는데
안심하고 다닐수 있겠죵~
평상시 M사이즈 입히는데 L사이즈 딱이에요
reviews.content_en: I used to go on walks fully armed with patches and spray, but now I can walk with peace of mind~ I usually wear M size, but L fits just right.

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content: 착용해 보니 이쁘고 다 좋은데 사이즈가 넘넘 작아지는것 같아요. L사이즈가 딱 맞아서 XL로 구입해서 넉럭히 입혔는데 갑자기 사이즈가 작아져서 XL도 딱 맞네요.
reviews.content_en: It looks pretty and everything is great, but the sizing seems to shrink really quickly. L fit perfectly so I bought XL thinking it would be roomier, but suddenly the sizing got smaller and XL fits just right too.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀여워용 노란색 강아지
reviews.content_en: So cute! Yellow doggy 💛

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 안티버그 올인원 넘 귀엽고 이뻐요ㆍ근데 모자는 고무줄이 넘 헐렁해서 얼굴을 다가리네요ㆍ
reviews.content_en: The anti-bug onesie is super cute and beautiful. But the hat's elastic is way too loose so it covers the face.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 늘 잘 입히고 잇습니당
reviews.content_en: Always wearing it well these days 😊

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 원래 L입는데 살이 너무빠져서 m시켰는데. 품은 맞긴하는데 길이가 쫌 짧다 사이즈가 애매하다
reviews.content_en: Originally wore size L, but lost weight so ordered M instead. The fit is okay but the length is a bit short. The sizing is awkward.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en: My Yorkie/Silky Terrier is 6.4kg. The fit and length are good, but the hood is too big;;. My kid said she looks like a school lunch lady ㅋㅎ;

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
산책할때 풀근처로 많이가는편인데 한번씩 진드기데리고와서
안티버그 올인원 옐로우로 구매했어요 등길이는길고 다리는 짧은편이라 다리부분을 접어입혀야하네요  다리부분만 잘맞았으면 너무만족했을제품인데  조금 아쉽네요  모자도조금커서 뛸때마다 모자가 걸리적거리는느낌이라 요것도 좀 ..줄일수있게만들면 더좋을듯요
reviews.content_en: We go near grass a lot during walks and keep picking up ticks, so I bought the ANTI BUG ALL IN ONE Yellow. My pup has a long back and short legs so I have to fold up the leg part when wearing it. Would've been really satisfied if just the leg part fit better, but it's a bit disappointing. The hood is also a bit big so it feels like it gets in the way every time she jumps. If you could make it adjustable it'd be even better.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 8.2kg 배 쫄려서 불편해해요 웨스티 숏다리인데 기장도 좀 짧네요 그리고 원단이 좀 두꺼워서 귀엽지만 반품비 비싸서 동네 친구한테 토스
reviews.content_en: My 8.2kg pup gets uncomfortable because the belly part is tight. She's a Westie with short legs and the length is also a bit short. Plus the fabric is pretty thick so it's cute but the return shipping was expensive so I passed it on to a friend in the neighborhood.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
살이
많이쪄서 이제 투엑스라지를 입어야 하는 ㅋㅋ아주 더울땐 못입가나 아니먄 물묻혀서 얼려 입어야할듯 해요 ㅜㅜ 더위를 너무 타서 벌써 답답해 합니다
reviews.content_en: My pup gained weight so now has to wear 2XL 😅 On really hot days she probably can't wear it, otherwise I'd have to wet it and freeze it before putting it on 😭 She's so heat-sensitive that she's already uncomfortable in it.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 맨날 이것만 입혀요!!ㅋ 진드기 무서웡
reviews.content_en: Only put this on her every day!! 😂 Ticks scare me 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이번년도엔 진드기가 엄청나서 예방차 산책할때입히려고샀는데 평균 2xl를 입으면은 널널했는데 이건 꽉끼고 사자마자 입혔는데 겨드랑이 부분이 터졌고 스판기는 1도없으며 머리에쓰는부분은 금방 흘러내림 담에 업글된다면은 머리부분은 고무줄을 해주고 가운데도충분히 늘어날수있으며 꼬리부분고무줄이더늘고 특히나 튼튼했으면좋겠습니다.기대한만큼 실망감도크네요
reviews.content_en: Ticks were really bad this year so I bought this as a preventative for walks. Usually wear 2XL which is loose, but this fits tight and it ripped under the armpit right after I bought it. There's barely any stretch and the head part slides down quickly. If there's an upgraded version next time, I'd appreciate it if you could add elastic to the head part, make the middle stretch enough, add more elastic to the tail part, and especially make it more durable. I'm really disappointed considering my high expectations.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이번에도 새로운 제품으로 나와서 두개 구매하게 되서 좋았고 댕댕이 여름을 잘 보낼 수 있을꺼 같아요
reviews.content_en: This time there's a new product out so I was happy to buy two. I think my pup will have a good summer.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 댕댕이의 이번 여름을 잘 보낼 수 있을꺼 같아요
reviews.content_en: I think my pup will be able to have a good summer.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 봄나들이용으로 구입.
reviews.content_en: Bought for spring outings.
